pilot_config.task: hidden chain, permutation = k-cycle on shown symbols; loss on final token only

depth_finding.reading: depth is a FIXED threshold (L>=2); no interaction with r

head_finding.reading: head count DOES interact with r: 1 head suffices at r<=2 but fails at r=3

caveat: h2 gave r3=0.598 but r4=1.000 (non-monotone) on a single seed -> needs multiple seeds to confirm; this is the main thing the GPU run must settle
verdict_pilot: supports (C) over (A)/(B): the r-dependent resource sits in attention capacity, not depth. NOT yet conclusive (1 seed, small grid).
